q.en: In what year did the siege and battle of the Alamo take place?
q.zh: 阿拉莫的围城与战役发生在哪一年？

options.en: 1845 according to some versions of the story

explain.en: The book opens with "The year was 1836" and the battle took place on March 6, 1836.
explain.zh: 书中开篇写道"那是 1836 年"，战役发生于 1836 年 3 月 6 日。

q.en: What does the word "Alamo" mean in Spanish?
q.zh: "Alamo" 这个词在西班牙语中是什么意思？

options.en: Mission according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 传教站（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says the fort's name was changed to the Alamo, Spanish for "cottonwood tree."
explain.zh: 书中说堡垒改名为 Alamo，在西班牙语中意为"棉花木"。

q.en: According to legend, what did Colonel Travis do to show the situation was hopeless?
q.zh: 根据传说，Travis 上校为了表明局势无望做了什么？

options.en: He drew a line in the dirt and asked men to step over if they'd stay and fight
options.zh: 他在泥地上画了一条线，让愿意留下战斗的人跨过去

options.en: He flew a red flag according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他升起了一面红旗（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Legend says Travis drew a line with his sword; every man but one stepped over to stay and fight.
explain.zh: 传说 Travis 用剑在地上画了一条线；除一人外，所有人都跨过去留下战斗。

q.en: Why did Mexico's outlawing of slavery anger the Anglo settlers?
q.zh: 为什么墨西哥废除奴隶制激怒了英裔移民？

options.en: They wanted to free the slaves
They wanted to keep slaves on plantations
options.zh: 他们想在种植园里保留奴隶

options.en: Slavery was already illegal in Mexico according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 奴隶制在墨西哥已经非法（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Anglo settlers wanted plantations and to keep slaves, so the law outlawing slavery angered them.
explain.zh: 英裔移民想要种植园并保留奴隶，所以废除奴隶制的法律激怒了他们。

q.en: What kind of government did Santa Anna create after becoming president in 1833?
q.zh: Santa Anna 在 1833 年成为总统后，建立了何种政府？

explain.en: In 1834 Santa Anna turned Mexico's democracy into a dictatorship.
explain.zh: 1834 年，Santa Anna 把墨西哥的民主制变成了独裁统治。

q.en: When did the Mexican attack on the Alamo begin?
q.zh: 墨西哥军队对阿拉莫的进攻是何时开始的？

options.en: On December 5, 1835 according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 1835 年 12 月 5 日（按书中另一种说法）
1836 年 3 月 6 日黎明前

explain.en: Just before dawn on March 6, the call to arms sounded and the attack began.
explain.zh: 3 月 6 日黎明前，进攻号角吹响，攻击开始。

q.en: At the battle of San Jacinto, what did the Texans shout as they charged?
q.zh: 在圣哈辛托战役中，得州人冲锋时高喊了什么？

explain.en: As they charged at San Jacinto, the Texans shouted "Remember the Alamo!" The battle lasted only 18 minutes.
explain.zh: 在圣哈辛托冲锋时，得州人高喊"铭记阿拉莫！"。那场战斗只持续了 18 分钟。

q.en: Which is true about Davy Crockett?
q.zh: 关于 Davy Crockett，哪一项是正确的？

options.en: He was a former U.S. soldier who went to Texas in search of land and money
options.zh: 他是一名前美国军人，为寻求土地和金钱来到得州

options.en: He was the mayor of San Antonio according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他是圣安东尼奥的市长（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Crockett was a former U.S. soldier; after losing his Congress seat in 1835 he went to Texas seeking land and money.
explain.zh: Crockett 曾是美军士兵；1835 年失去国会议席后，他前往得州寻求土地和金钱。

q.en: How does the book say the Alamo is viewed differently in the U.S. and Mexico?
q.zh: 书中说美国与墨西哥对阿拉莫的看法有何不同？

options.en: U.S. sees it as heroism for freedom; Mexico sees it as stealing land
options.zh: 美国视其为追求自由的英雄主义；墨西哥视其为掠夺土地

options.en: Mexico sees it as a great victory; U.S. ignores it according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 墨西哥视其为伟大胜利；美国不予理会（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Both see it exactly the same way

explain.en: In the U.S. it is a symbol of heroism for freedom; in Mexico it is seen as part of a campaign to steal Mexican land.
explain.zh: 在美国它是追求自由的英雄主义象征；在墨西哥它被视为掠夺墨西哥土地行动的一部分。

q.en: How did William Barret Travis die?
q.zh: William Barret Travis 是如何阵亡的？

options.en: He was executed after surrendering according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他投降后被处决（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: He was one of the first Texans killed, by return fire from the Mexican army
options.zh: 他是最早阵亡的得州人之一，死于墨西哥军队的反击炮火

explain.en: Return fire from the Mexican army killed Travis; he was one of the first Texans to die at the Alamo.
explain.zh: 墨西哥军队的反击炮火杀死了 Travis；他是阿拉莫最早阵亡的得州人之一。

prompt.en: If you could ask one defender of the Alamo a question, what would you ask and why?
prompt.zh: 如果你能向一位阿拉莫守军提问一个问题，你会问什么？为什么？

en: Think about what the book left unexplained, like the line-in-the-dirt legend.
Write a question a historian might ask to learn more.
zh: 想想书中未解释清楚的地方，比如"地上画线"的传说。
写一个历史学家可能会问、以了解更多真相的问题。
